seed_problem: Partition a weighted graph into two balanced halves maximizing cut weight; checker validates balance and scores cut/baseline.
mutation: composite: keep the max-cut goal but replace strict 50/50 cardinality balance with a population-weighted balance BAND [L,U] on one side (nodes carry integer populations), so the constraint becomes a knapsack-style capacity window and the balanced max-cut stays NP-hard while admitting many divergent balance-aware heuristics.
title: Firebreak Cohorts: Population-Balanced Contact Severance
strategies: balance-only baseline: fill the lighter cohort in index order (cut-oblivious), always inside the band
balance-aware greedy: assign venues (heaviest-degree first) to the cohort that maximizes marginal cut while keeping room in the band
flip/swap local search: from any feasible split, repeatedly flip a node or swap a 0/1 pair when it raises the cut and keeps A's population in [L,U]
randomized multi-restart local search: many seeded starts + local search, keep the best feasible cut
